message:
✨ Replace hardcoded gray tokens with semantic design tokens (28 files) (#1966)

Replace bg-gray-800, text-gray-300/400/500, border-gray-600/700 with
semantic tokens (bg-secondary, text-foreground, text-muted-foreground,
border-border, etc.) across 28 files.

Focuses on:
- All 14 llm-d benchmark/AI cards (NightlyE2E, StackSelector,
  KVCache, PerformanceTimeline, Latency, Throughput, BenchmarkHero,
  HardwareLeaderboard, EPPRouting, LLMdFlow, ResourceUtilization,
  LLMdAIInsights, LLMdConfigurator, PDDisaggregation)
- Layout, marketplace, widget, unified card system
- ClusterGroups, WorkloadDeployment, MobileBrowser, ClusterDropZone
- CardWrapper, PortalTooltip

Intentionally preserved:
- Game components (KubeChess, Kubedle, PodSweeper)
- Opacity variants (bg-gray-900/30, etc.)
- Status color indicators (bg-gray-500 for unknown/cancelled)
- Light-mode gray classes, gradients, SVG fills
- Disabled states with cursor-not-allowed

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
